---
output: github_document
---

# Bits {-#bits}

Text goes here. Another bit on master!

Example HTML table...

<div class="table-blue">
<table>
<thead>
  <tr>
    <th>H1</th>
    <th>H2</th>
    <th>H3</th>
    <th>H4</th>
  </tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
  <tr class="odd">
    <td>R1C1</td>
    <td>R1C2</td>
    <td>R1C3</td>
    <td>R1C4</td>
  </tr>
  <tr class="even">
    <td>R2C1</td>
    <td colspan="3">R2C2-4</td>
  </tr>
  <tr class="odd">
    <td>R3C1</td>
    <td>R3C2</td>
    <td>R3C3</td>
    <td>R3C4</td>
  </tr>
  <tr class="even">
    <td colspan="2">R4C1-2</td>
    <td>R4C3</td>
    <td>R4C4</td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<div class="callout-note">
**A note!**

Here's a callout box for notes.
</div>

<div class="callout-tip">
**A tip!**

Here's a callout box for tips.
</div>

<div class="callout-warn">
**A warning!**

Here's a callout box for warnings
</div>
